summary: Smart Guided Help System testing completed. All 17 features tested and PASSED. The help system includes: HelpTip component with (?) hover icons, Smart XAI row suggestions, Target variable auto-suggestion, Algorithm descriptions, Collapsible Getting Started Guide panel with 7 steps, SHAP/LIME/Cluster help text, and better error prevention messages.

issues:
Minor: Console warning about validateDOMNesting -
cannot appear as descendant of

in Badge component. This is a React DOM nesting issue but doesn't affect functionality.

TEST 5: PASSED - Guide panel collapses/hides when clicked again

TEST 10: PASSED - 'Use this target' button selects the suggested target
TEST 11: PASSED - Target suggestion disappears after selection
TEST 12: PASSED - Algorithm description shown for 'auto' mode

TEST 18: PASSED - Smart row suggestions found (Random sample, Highest prediction, Lowest prediction, Representative)
TEST 19: PASSED - Found 4 smart row suggestion chips
TEST 20: PASSED - Clicking smart row suggestion chip changes row input value
TEST 21: PASSED - SHAP help text found: 'SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) shows how each feature...'
TEST 22: PASSED - LIME help text found: 'LIME (Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations) explains...'
TEST 23: PASSED - Guide panel tracks progress - Steps 1-5 show green checkmarks (completed)

critical_code_review_comments: Help system implementation is comprehensive and well-structured:
1. HelpTip component (line 93-103) provides consistent (?) hover tooltips across the UI
2. ALGO_DESCRIPTIONS constant (line 36-47) provides clear algorithm explanations
3. GUIDE_STEPS constant (line 49-57) defines all 7 steps with descriptions
4. suggestedTarget useMemo (~line 1059-1077) intelligently suggests target columns based on data characteristics
5. smartRowSuggestions useMemo (~line 1080-1108) provides 4 smart row suggestions for XAI
6. Guide panel (~line 1768-1790) with progress tracking and collapsible behavior
7. All data-testids are properly implemented for testing
Minor issue: Console warning about DOM nesting in Badge component (validateDOMNesting) - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Used built-in sample dataset: Loan Approval (20 rows, binary classification)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Guided Help System fully tested and working. Key data-testids verified: guide-toggle-btn, guide-panel, guide-step-1 through guide-step-7, suggested-target, use-suggested-target-btn, algo-description, smart-row-suggestions, smart-row-0 through smart-row-3, shap-help-text, lime-help-text, show-guide-from-dashboard, help-tip-icon, eval-mode-selector. Guide panel shows progress with green checkmarks for completed steps. All help tooltips work on hover. Dark mode toggle works correctly with all new components.
